description: Author renderer goldens for the container model: task-container subgraphs with nested Preflights/Guardrails, two plan-level subgraphs, invisible anchors + anchor->anchor edges, NO done_ node, NO task->guardrail fan-out edge, byte-identical re-render, and edit-a-plan-guardrail-check -> graph --check stale (source-sha256 folds plan-level checks).
